insight.summary: GitHub REST API: replying to PR review comments requires in_reply_to parameter, not a /replies sub-resource
insight.detail: When replying to a pull request review comment via the GitHub REST API, use POST /repos/{owner}/{repo}/pulls/{pr}/comments with the in_reply_to field set to the parent comment's database ID. Attempting POST /repos/{owner}/{repo}/pulls/comments/{comment_id}/replies returns a 404. The in_reply_to approach is documented but the intuitive /replies sub-resource path does not exist.
insight.action: Use `gh api repos/{owner}/{repo}/pulls/{pr}/comments -F in_reply_to={comment_id} -f body="..."` to reply to PR review comments via gh CLI.
